# ai-playbooks

> Structured, research-backed playbooks for AI agents — built with scientific rigor and validated through controlled trials.

## What this is

AI agents produce inconsistent results because they operate without structured procedures. This project builds **playbooks**: step-by-step procedures an AI agent follows to reliably produce high-quality output on a specific task class.

Each playbook is research-backed (synthesized from academic and practitioner literature), tested (validated through controlled trials), and self-correcting (behavioral contracts, quality gates, failure-mode registers).

## Available playbooks

- [angle-gen-kit](angle-gen-kit/): Research angle generation — given a 1-2 sentence topic, generates vocabulary-diverse research angles covering traditions a keyword search would miss. Validated: 22/22 inputs, Q7 avg 3.0/3, Q5 avg 2.82/3.

## Key files

- [angle-gen-kit/angle-generation.md](angle-gen-kit/angle-generation.md): The main procedure
- [angle-gen-kit/intake.md](angle-gen-kit/intake.md): Intake protocol
- [angle-gen-kit/angle-quality.md](angle-gen-kit/angle-quality.md): Quality gates and rubric
- [angle-gen-kit/CLAUDE.md](angle-gen-kit/CLAUDE.md): Behavioral contract for agents using the kit

## How to use

Copy the playbook files into your project and instruct your AI agent to follow the procedure. The CLAUDE.md file is the entry point for Claude-based agents.
